selections.name: Silken Salute (NZ)
selections.reason: Won on debut at this track and distance on soft going. Has the valuable race experience and looks progressive enough to win again.

selections.name: Brumal
selections.reason: Won as favorite on debut at Ipswich over 6 3/4f. Showed good tactical speed and will be better for that outing.

selections.name: Pirouette Girl
selections.reason: Third-up today. Improved effort when second at Gold Coast on slow going last start. Drawn perfectly in barrier 1 to get a soft run.

selections.name: Zeddich
selections.reason: First starter by Glenfiddich. Has trialled well leading into this, including a recent win at Sunshine Coast. Watch betting markets.

danger_horse.name: Momoka (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: First starter from the Kendrick yard. Progressing well with a recent trial win and draws a nice gate.

selections.name: Manukau
selections.reason: Brings strong Sydney form north. Narrowly beaten at Warwick Farm last start. Handles soft tracks well and gets a great draw.

selections.name: Tarps
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after wins at Gold Coast. Drawn the inside rail and has a solid record on rain-affected ground.

selections.name: Surprise Honey
selections.reason: Resuming from a spell but has an excellent fresh record. Classy mare who can sprint well while fresh.

selections.name: Balance The Books
selections.reason: Another resuming runner with a strong first-up record. Won first-up last preparation at this track and trip.

danger_horse.name: Viale
danger_horse.reason: Won well at Ipswich last start. Up in grade but drops in weight and is racing in good heart.

selections.name: Mr Buster (IRE)
selections.reason: Impressive winner at this track and distance last start when second-up. Unbeaten second-up in the past and looks the clear testing material from the inside gate.

selections.name: Jenni Moreese
selections.reason: Flying at the moment with back-to-back wins at this track and distance. Handles the soft going perfectly and drops in weight.

selections.name: Brindavan (IRE)
selections.reason: Consistent gelding who won here two starts back. Drawn well and will be prominent in the finish.

selections.name: Absolute Sunshine
selections.reason: Won nicely here last start defeating Make A Call. Confidence is high and can feature again.

danger_horse.name: Make A Call
danger_horse.reason: Narrowly beaten by Absolute Sunshine last start. Consistent performer who is always around the mark.

selections.name: Akkadian Emperor (IRE)
selections.reason: Racing in great heart. Narrowly beaten here last start over 1 3/8m. Ready to peak and looks the one to beat.

selections.name: Mr O'reilly
selections.reason: Won well at Doomben last start over 1 3/8m. Form is hard to fault and deserves his chance in this grade.

selections.name: Saint Emilion
selections.reason: Solid third behind Mr O'reilly last start. Slowly putting it together and should appreciate the step up in trip.

selections.name: El Jasor (IRE)
selections.reason: Fourth behind Akkadian Emperor last start. Very fit and ready to peak, handles soft ground.

danger_horse.name: Prochester (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Not far away when fourth behind Mr O'reilly last start. Drops significantly in weight and can surprise.

selections.name: Don'tcha Think
selections.reason: Won well at Doomben last start on a rain-affected track. Drawn the inside rail and has his confidence back.

selections.name: Ready For The Trip
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten here last start. Consistent type who will be in the finish again despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Canberra Legend (IRE)
selections.reason: Third-up today. Fitter for two runs back and drops in class. Capable of sharp improvement.

selections.name: Moon Sweeper
selections.reason: Third-up and ready to peak. Solid third at Doomben last start and handles the soft conditions.

danger_horse.name: Irama
danger_horse.reason: Recent form is sound. Placed at Doomben last start and can figure in the finish here.

selections.name: Soothsayer
selections.reason: Class runner of the field resuming. Dual Group 3 placegetter who has the quality to overcome the wide draw and win fresh.

selections.name: Pocket Full
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten here last start. Extremely consistent and is knocking on the door for a win.

selections.name: Chalice Well
selections.reason: Won impressively at Sunshine Coast last start. Up in grade but drops to 115lbs and is flying.

selections.name: Now Is The Hour
selections.reason: Resuming from a spell. Has won previously when fresh and recent trial was solid. Bold showing expected.

danger_horse.name: Boys Night Out
danger_horse.reason: Resuming. Classy type who can sprint well fresh, though the wide gate is a concern.

selections.name: Last Command
selections.reason: Racing very well. Won here two starts back and narrowly beaten last time. Super honest and perfectly placed.

selections.name: Ten Deep (GB)
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten by Glass Of Rose here last start. Racing in great heart and looks a major threat.

selections.name: True To Form (USA)
selections.reason: Third-up and ready to peak. Solid third here last start and draws perfectly in barrier 3.

selections.name: Belvedere Boys
selections.reason: Resuming from a spell. Classy gelding who has trialled well and can sprint nicely fresh.

danger_horse.name: Smart Legend
danger_horse.reason: Second-up. Good effort when second at Cairns fresh. Has ability and draws well.

selections.name: Fabulantes
selections.reason: On a three-run winning streak. Won the Gold Coast QTIS Jewel 3yo last start. Hard to go past despite the wide draw.

selections.name: The Wheelbarrow
selections.reason: Won nicely here last start. Drawn terribly in barrier 20 but has the tactical speed to overcome it if he gets luck.

selections.name: Call Da Vinci
selections.reason: Second-up. Narrowly beaten by Fabulantes last start. Fitter now and gets a better weight swing.

selections.name: Tupakara
selections.reason: Won well at Wyong last start. Progressive filly who drops to 121lbs and draws well.

danger_horse.name: Spanish Treasure
danger_horse.reason: Third behind The Wheelbarrow last start. Drawn perfectly in barrier 2 and will get a soft run.

selections.name: Uncommon James
selections.reason: Class act resuming. Group 1 winner who has trialled well. The clear class runner of the field and the one to beat.

selections.name: Hidden Wealth
selections.reason: Resuming. Excellent fresh record and won a recent trial. Major threat if he can overcome the wide draw.

selections.name: Golden Boom
selections.reason: Resuming. Has won previously when fresh and trialled well. Four-time black-type winner who commands respect.

selections.name: Abounding
selections.reason: Resuming. Classy mare who performs well fresh. Will need luck from the draw but has the ability.

danger_horse.name: Battlefield
danger_horse.reason: Recent form is sound. Narrowly beaten at Toowoomba last start. Fit and drops to 117lbs.
